query: amateur snapshot with crooked tilted horizon, accidentally rotated photo, off-kilter handheld shot
message: composition_and_structure / unconventional_framing — anti_aesthetic. Off-kilter, dutch-angle, accidentally rotated handheld snapshots with informal vernacular framing. Includes parties, sports wipeouts, fallen signs, casual portraiture, awkward angles.

response.objective_caption: A translucent pink gummy figure is visible in the upper left above a white surface. Below it, a translucent yellow gummy figure lies on the white surface next to a small red strip. To the right, a dark brown chocolate bear stands upright. The scene is set against a solid black background.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A motion-blurred translucent pink gummy figure appears to fall through the upper left of the frame above a white surface, while below, a translucent yellow gummy figure lies prone beside a red strip. An upright dark brown chocolate bear stands to the right, observing the scene. The surreal arrangement of candies against a stark black background creates an irrational, dreamlike narrative tableau.
